idea_summary: Baseline 7-kernel fused MoE pipeline from tutorial (00_baseline.co)
Fuse scatter into WGMMA, count+build, quant+sort+gather to reduce 7 kernels to 4
Apply all tutorial optimizations: parallel.async, grid swap, L2 persistence, QSG
Replace opt_copy (scalar 32-bit loads) with cp.async tiled_copy using SM80_CP_AS
